title: corniola tenella
intro: Corniola tenella is a plant species belonging to the Boraginaceae family, commonly known as the borage or forget-me-not family. It is a perennial herb native to Europe and Asia, known for its medicinal properties. The plant's roots and leaves have been used in traditional medicine to treat various health issues, including digestive problems and skin conditions. The roots can be prepared as a decoction or tincture, while the leaves can be used in herbal teas or infusions to take advantage of its health benefits.
